Commissioner Handy said this morn
ing: 1--WE will keep a strict lookout to
see that the Washington Water Power
company does not begin to lay line or
dig up the street. The order from
Corporation Counsel Judson gives the
company permission TO haul material
to Third averHe but we will not
permit it to go beyond that mark.


"The fault ] have to find with the
restraining order is that it provides
for only a $500 obstruction bond. If
an accident should happen on the
street this amount might not come
within one-tenth of the amount that
would have to be paid by the city for
damages
